meta.title: BC PCP CPR Scenario Sheets
meta.focus: license exam style CPR scenario sheets

scenarios.titleZh: 成人目击性心脏骤停（健身房倒地）
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a community gym for a 54-year-old male who suddenly collapsed while running on a treadmill.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达社区健身房，一名 54 岁男性在跑步机上运动时突然倒地。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Indoor scene safe. AED available at front desk. Several bystanders present.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。室内环境安全。前台有 AED。周围有多名旁观者。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient supine on the floor, unresponsive, pale, occasional agonal gasps. A bystander is doing shallow chest compressions.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者仰卧在地，无反应，面色苍白，偶有濒死喘息。一名旁观者正在做浅而无效的胸外按压。
primarySurveyEn: Breathing: No effective breathing; agonal respirations only
Circulation: No carotid pulse within 10 seconds
Rapid Transport?: Yes, after early on-scene resuscitation priorities
Interventions: Immediate high-quality CPR, attach AED, clear role assignment
primarySurveyZh: Breathing：无有效呼吸，仅见濒死喘息
Circulation：10 秒内摸不到颈动脉搏动
Rapid Transport?：是，但先完成早期现场复苏关键动作
Interventions：立即高质量 CPR、接 AED、明确分工
secondarySurveyEn: Witnesses say he grabbed his chest and collapsed about 3 minutes ago
No known trauma
Gym staff report a history of hypertension but no further medical history available
No obvious medication list on scene
Key exam issue: recognize agonal breathing is not normal breathing
secondarySurveyZh: 目击者称他约 3 分钟前先捂胸后倒地
无已知创伤
健身房人员只知道他有高血压史，其他病史不详
现场无明确药物清单
核心考点：必须识别濒死喘息不是正常呼吸
vitalSignsEn: SpO2: Not reliable / not applicable in pulseless patient
vitalSignsZh: SpO2：无脉搏状态下不可靠 / 无意义
scenarios.commentsEn: Classic shockable-arrest style call. High marks come from recognizing arrest immediately, minimizing pauses, using the AED early, and managing the scene like a team leader.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这是典型可电击骤停题。高分点在于迅速识别骤停、减少中断、尽早使用 AED，并且像现场带队者一样管理流程。
interventionsEn: Immediate high-quality CPR
Apply AED as soon as available
Rotate compressors every 2 minutes if possible
Keep patient warm and organized for transport after initial arrest priorities
interventionsZh: 立即开始高质量 CPR
一旦可用立刻接 AED
如条件允许每 2 分钟轮换按压者
完成早期骤停关键动作后保暖并有序准备转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: witnessed collapse with CPR in progress. B: chest pain before collapse, down time about 3 minutes. A/T: pulseless, apneic, agonal gasps only, AED indicated. R: continue arrest pathway and rapid transport once appropriate.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：目击性倒地，现场 CPR 中。B：倒地前胸痛，停搏约 3 分钟。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸，仅濒死喘息，适用 AED。R：继续骤停流程，并在合适时快速转运。

scenarios.titleZh: 家中未目击心脏骤停（停搏时间不明）
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a private residence for an 81-year-old female found on the bedroom floor by her husband.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达私人住宅，一名 81 岁女性被丈夫发现倒在卧室地板上。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Quiet home environment. Emotional spouse present.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。家庭环境安静，但配偶情绪非常激动。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient on floor beside bed, unresponsive, apneic, pulseless. Husband is crying and repeatedly asks if she can still be helped.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者位于床边地板，无反应、无呼吸、无脉搏。丈夫哭泣并反复询问是否还能救回来。
primarySurveyEn: Rapid Transport?: Depends on local arrest management pathway; immediate focus is organized CPR
Interventions: Begin CPR, assign roles, collect downtime clues from husband
primarySurveyZh: Rapid Transport?：视当地骤停流程而定；当前重点是有组织 CPR
Interventions：开始 CPR、明确分工、从丈夫处快速收集停搏时间线索
secondarySurveyEn: Last seen normal around 02:00, found at 06:30
Medication bottles nearby: antihypertensive, anticoagulant
No obvious signs of trauma
Dependent lividity not obvious
Key exam issue: balance active resuscitation with prognosis clues and scene communication
secondarySurveyZh: 最后一次正常见到约在凌晨 02:00，发现时间为 06:30
附近药物包括降压药与抗凝药
无明显外伤
尸斑不明显
核心考点：在积极复苏、预后线索和现场沟通之间取得平衡
scenarios.commentsEn: This scenario is less about glamour and more about judgment. The exam often tests whether you can stay systematic while the family is distressed and the downtime is uncertain.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这类题不靠花哨，靠判断。考试常看你能否在家属情绪崩溃、停搏时间不明时仍保持系统性。
interventionsEn: Begin CPR immediately
Assign one provider to obtain downtime and medical history clues
Keep spouse away from active work space while communicating calmly
Prepare for transport according to arrest pathway and scene findings
interventionsZh: 立即开始 CPR
指定一人快速收集停搏时间和病史线索
安抚配偶并将其与工作区分开
按骤停流程和现场发现准备后续转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: unwitnessed home arrest. B: last seen normal at 02:00, found 06:30. A/T: pulseless, apneic, medications include antihypertensive and anticoagulant. R: continue arrest management with downtime context considered.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：家中未目击骤停。B：最后正常见于 02:00，06:30 发现。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸，药物含降压药和抗凝药。R：结合停搏时间背景继续骤停处理。
bonusPointsZh: 不耽误 CPR 地收集时间线

scenarios.titleZh: 异物梗阻进展为心脏骤停（餐厅）
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a restaurant for a 67-year-old male who choked while eating steak and then became unresponsive.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达餐厅，一名 67 岁男性吃牛排时发生异物梗阻，随后失去意识。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Public scene, crowded restaurant, anxious bystanders.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。公共场所，餐厅拥挤，旁观者焦虑。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient on floor near table, cyanotic, unresponsive. Witnesses say abdominal thrusts were attempted before collapse.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者倒在餐桌旁地面，发绀、无反应。目击者表示倒地前曾做过腹部冲击。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: CPR priority; AED as available
Rapid Transport?: Yes after immediate arrest care priorities addressed
Interventions: CPR, airway management, visible foreign body checks only
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：先 CPR；有条件接 AED
Rapid Transport?：是，但先完成即时骤停处理
Interventions：CPR、气道处理、仅检查可见异物
secondarySurveyEn: Steak meal immediately before choking episode
Collapse estimated less than 2 minutes ago
Food visible in mouth but not easily reachable
No trauma history
Key exam issue: know when the call changes from choking algorithm to full arrest management
secondarySurveyZh: 在吃牛排时发生梗阻
估计倒地发生不到 2 分钟
口腔可见食物，但不易直接移除
无创伤史
核心考点：明确何时从 choking 流程切换到 full arrest management
scenarios.commentsEn: This is a classic transition scenario. The stem is usually testing whether you understand that once the patient is pulseless, you are now managing a cardiac arrest caused by an airway problem.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这是非常典型的转折题。题目常在考你是否知道：一旦病人无脉搏，本质上你现在处理的是由气道问题引起的心脏骤停。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR
Manage airway with visible foreign body checks only
Avoid blind finger sweeps
Prepare for rapid transport after immediate arrest priorities
interventionsZh: 立即 CPR
处理气道时只检查可见异物
避免盲目手指探取
完成即时骤停处理后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: choking progressed to arrest in restaurant. B: steak meal, abdominal thrusts attempted, collapse under 2 minutes. A/T: pulseless, apneic, cyanotic, airway obstruction suspected. R: continue arrest management with airway focus.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：餐厅异物梗阻进展为骤停。B：牛排进食后发生，曾做腹部冲击，倒地不足 2 分钟。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、发绀，怀疑气道阻塞。R：以气道为重点继续骤停处理。
bonusPointsEn: Link cause of arrest to airway problem
bonusPointsZh: 把骤停原因和气道问题联系起来
让 CPR 和气道操作配合起来

scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a backyard pool for a 4-year-old child pulled from the water by family members.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达后院泳池现场，一名 4 岁儿童刚被家属从水中拉出。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Wet pool deck, panicked family, scene otherwise safe.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 泳池边地面湿滑，家属高度恐慌，其余环境基本安全。
scenarios.conditionEn: Child limp, cyanotic, soaked, unresponsive. One family member is attempting ineffective chest compressions.
scenarios.conditionZh: 儿童身体松软、发绀、全身湿透、无反应。一名家属正在进行无效按压。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Pediatric arrest management as available
Rapid Transport?: Yes, after immediate resuscitation priorities initiated
Interventions: Pediatric CPR with strong attention to ventilations
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按儿科骤停条件可用资源处理
Rapid Transport?：是，但先启动即时复苏
Interventions：儿科 CPR，特别重视通气
secondarySurveyEn: Estimated submersion 3 to 5 minutes
No trauma observed
Family reports child was playing unsupervised briefly
Large emotional crowd present
Key exam issue: pediatric arrests are frequently hypoxic before they are cardiac
secondarySurveyZh: 估计淹没时间 3 到 5 分钟
未见创伤
家属称孩子短时间无人看护时发生意外
大量情绪化家属在场
核心考点：儿科骤停往往先是缺氧问题，后才发展成心脏骤停
scenarios.commentsEn: The exam is often looking for calm, child-appropriate CPR and recognition that oxygenation and ventilation matter heavily in this arrest pattern.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这类题常看你是否能冷静做出符合儿童体型的 CPR，并认识到氧合与通气在这种骤停类型中特别重要。
interventionsEn: Begin pediatric CPR immediately
Ensure effective ventilations
Control family crowding around patient
Keep child warm after removal from water
interventionsZh: 立即开始儿科 CPR
确保有效通气
控制围观家属，腾出工作空间
离水后尽量保暖
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: pediatric drowning arrest. B: submerged 3 to 5 minutes, family pulled child from pool. A/T: pulseless, apneic, cyanotic, wet and cold. R: continue pediatric arrest management with strong ventilation focus.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：儿科溺水骤停。B：淹没约 3–5 分钟，家属已从水中拉出。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、发绀、湿冷。R：继续儿科骤停流程并强调通气。

scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a private home for a 3-month-old infant found unresponsive during a nap check.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达私人住宅，一名 3 个月婴儿在午睡检查时被发现无反应。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Quiet home scene, extreme parental distress.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。住宅环境安静，但父母情绪极度崩溃。
scenarios.conditionEn: Infant pale, limp, apneic in crib. Parent removed infant and is shaking and crying.
scenarios.conditionZh: 婴儿在婴儿床内苍白、松软、无呼吸。家长已将婴儿抱出，正在哭泣并明显失控。
primarySurveyEn: Circulation: No central pulse detected quickly
Rapid Transport?: Yes, after immediate resuscitation initiated
Interventions: Infant CPR, efficient airway positioning, controlled scene communication
primarySurveyZh: Circulation：未能迅速摸到中心脉搏
Rapid Transport?：是，但先启动即时复苏
Interventions：婴儿 CPR、有效摆位气道、控制现场沟通
secondarySurveyEn: Last seen normal 45 minutes earlier
No obvious trauma or choking signs
Parents report infant had been feeding normally earlier
Key exam issue: technique, composure, and timeline history all matter
secondarySurveyZh: 45 分钟前最后一次见到时正常
无明显外伤或异物梗阻迹象
父母表示更早前喂养情况正常
核心考点：技术、镇定度、时间线病史都重要
scenarios.commentsEn: This scenario often feels emotionally brutal on purpose. The exam wants to see if you can stay precise and gentle without losing structure.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这类题往往故意设置得非常沉重。考试要看的就是你能否在情绪压力下仍然精确、轻柔且有条理。
interventionsEn: Begin infant CPR immediately
Use careful airway positioning and effective ventilations
Move parent out of immediate working area while communicating compassionately
Document timeline carefully
interventionsZh: 立即开始婴儿 CPR
仔细摆位气道并确保有效通气
在同理沟通下让家长离开直接工作区
仔细记录时间线
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: infant found unresponsive in crib. B: last seen normal 45 minutes ago, no trauma or choking signs. A/T: pale, apneic, pulseless infant. R: continue infant arrest management and rapid transport.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：婴儿床内发现无反应婴儿。B：45 分钟前正常，无创伤或梗阻迹象。A/T：苍白、无呼吸、无脉搏。R：继续婴儿骤停流程并快速转运。
bonusPointsEn: Stay composed in a devastating scene
Protect scene structure despite parental distress
bonusPointsZh: 在父母崩溃时仍守住流程

scenarios.titleEn: Opioid Overdose Arrest in Public Washroom
scenarios.titleZh: 公共洗手间阿片过量心脏骤停
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a mall washroom for a 29-year-old male found collapsed in a locked stall after suspected fentanyl use.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达商场洗手间，一名 29 岁男性疑似使用 fentanyl 后倒在上锁隔间内。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Confined, awkward scene. Potential sharps hazard. Security already forced entry.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场狭小、操作受限。存在锐器风险。保安已强行开门。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient cyanotic, apneic, pulseless on the floor beside drug paraphernalia.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者倒在地面，发绀、无呼吸、无脉搏，旁边可见吸毒工具。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Arrest care resources as available
Rapid Transport?: Yes after immediate CPR priorities and scene extraction planning
Interventions: CPR, airway/ventilation focus, scene safety
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按骤停可用资源处理
Rapid Transport?：是，但先完成即时 CPR 优先项并规划搬运
Interventions：CPR、强调气道/通气、确保现场安全
secondarySurveyEn: Friends say fentanyl used about 10 minutes earlier
Burnt foil and syringe visible
No trauma noted
Key exam issue: do not mistake pulseless overdose for simple respiratory depression
secondarySurveyZh: 朋友称约 10 分钟前吸食了 fentanyl
可见烧焦锡纸与注射器
未见创伤
核心考点：无脉搏的 overdose 不是单纯呼吸抑制，而是骤停
scenarios.commentsEn: This is a high-yield exam pattern: obvious cause, but you still must not lose the fundamentals of arrest care.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这是高频考试模式：病因看起来很明显，但你仍不能丢掉骤停处理的基础优先级。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR in confined space
Pay attention to sharps safety
Aggressive airway and ventilation support
Plan extraction from washroom without unnecessary delay
interventionsZh: 在狭小空间内立即 CPR
注意锐器安全
加强气道和通气支持
尽快规划从洗手间搬出患者
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: suspected opioid overdose arrest in public washroom. B: fentanyl use about 10 minutes before collapse. A/T: pulseless, apneic, cyanotic, paraphernalia present. R: continue arrest pathway with airway focus and transport.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：公共洗手间疑似阿片过量骤停。B：倒地前约 10 分钟使用 fentanyl。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、发绀，现场有吸毒工具。R：强调气道并继续骤停流程与转运。
bonusPointsEn: Do not confuse overdose with non-arrest sedation
bonusPointsZh: 不要把 overdose 误当成非骤停昏睡
处理狭小空间站位问题

scenarios.titleZh: 高速车祸后创伤性心脏骤停
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a highway rollover. A 36-year-old driver has been ejected from the vehicle.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达高速翻车现场，一名 36 岁司机被甩出车外。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Highway shoulder, traffic controlled by fire and police. Debris and blood on scene.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 高速路肩，消防和警方已控制车流。现场有碎片和血迹。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient supine on gravel shoulder, severe facial trauma, chest deformity, unresponsive, apneic, pulseless.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者仰卧于碎石路肩，面部重创，胸廓畸形，无反应、无呼吸、无脉搏。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: As indicated within arrest pathway
Rapid Transport?: Yes; scene time judgment critical
Interventions: CPR plus immediate recognition of traumatic mechanism and reversible priorities
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按骤停流程需要使用
Positioning：仰卧，但需考虑创伤因素
Rapid Transport?：是；现场时间判断很关键
Interventions：CPR，同时立即识别创伤机制和可逆优先项
secondarySurveyEn: Ejected from vehicle during high-speed rollover
Bystanders attempted to move patient before EMS arrival
Major blunt trauma pattern present
Key exam issue: traumatic arrest is not approached exactly like a simple medical VF arrest
secondarySurveyZh: 高速翻滚中被甩出车外
旁观者在 EMS 到达前试图移动患者
明显重大钝伤模式
核心考点：创伤性骤停的处理思路不能等同于普通医疗性 VF 骤停
scenarios.commentsEn: The exam often uses this to see if you can think mechanism, prognosis, and reversible causes at the same time instead of mindlessly doing textbook medical-arrest CPR only.
scenarios.commentsZh: 考试常用这类题看你能否同时想到损伤机制、预后线索和可逆因素，而不是只机械套用教科书式医疗骤停 CPR。
interventionsEn: Begin CPR while immediately considering traumatic cause pattern
Coordinate team around trauma priorities and movement restrictions
Control scene flow on roadside safely
Prepare urgent transport according to traumatic arrest pathway
interventionsZh: 开始 CPR 的同时立即考虑创伤性机制
围绕创伤优先项和搬动限制协调团队
在路边安全控制现场流程
按创伤性骤停路径准备紧急转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: traumatic arrest after high-speed MVC. B: ejected from vehicle, bystanders moved patient before EMS arrival. A/T: pulseless, apneic, major blunt trauma pattern. R: continue traumatic arrest management and urgent transport decision-making.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：高速 MVC 后创伤性骤停。B：患者被甩出车外，旁观者曾移动患者。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸，重大钝伤模式明显。R：继续创伤性骤停处理并紧急判断转运。
bonusPointsEn: Differentiate traumatic from medical arrest thinking
bonusPointsZh: 区分创伤性和医疗性骤停思路
聪明利用损伤机制信息

scenarios.titleZh: 产后倒地并发生心脏骤停
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a residence for a 32-year-old female, 6 days postpartum, who developed shortness of breath and chest pain before collapsing.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达住宅，一名 32 岁女性产后第 6 天，倒地前出现气短和胸痛。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Home scene safe. Distressed husband present, newborn crying nearby.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 住宅现场安全。丈夫情绪激动，旁边有哭泣的新生儿。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient on living room floor, apneic, pulseless, pale. Family started CPR just before EMS arrival.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者位于客厅地面，无呼吸、无脉搏、面色苍白。家属在 EMS 到达前刚开始 CPR。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Arrest pathway resources as available
Rapid Transport?: Yes after immediate resuscitation priorities initiated
Interventions: CPR, strong scene control, consider high-risk postpartum causes
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按骤停流程可用资源处理
Rapid Transport?：是，但先启动即时复苏
Interventions：CPR、强化现场控制、考虑产后高危病因
secondarySurveyEn: Chest pain and dyspnea for about 10 minutes before collapse
6 days postpartum
No trauma reported
Key exam issue: context dramatically changes differential and urgency
secondarySurveyZh: 倒地前约 10 分钟有胸痛和呼吸困难
产后第 6 天
无创伤史
核心考点：背景信息会大幅改变你的鉴别与紧迫度判断
scenarios.commentsEn: The exam loves red-flag context. This one is testing whether you notice postpartum physiology and do not treat it as just another generic collapse.
scenarios.commentsZh: 考试很爱这种红旗背景题。重点在于你是否能注意到产后这一高危上下文，而不是把它当普通倒地。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR
Strong scene control in emotionally chaotic home
Consider postpartum high-risk causes during management
Prepare rapid transport after initial arrest care
interventionsZh: 立即 CPR
在混乱家庭环境中强化现场控制
处理时考虑产后高危病因
完成初始骤停处理后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: postpartum female collapsed and arrested at home. B: chest pain and dyspnea for 10 minutes prior, 6 days postpartum. A/T: pulseless, apneic, pale. R: continue arrest pathway and rapid transport with high-risk postpartum context.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：产后女性在家倒地并骤停。B：倒地前胸痛和气短约 10 分钟，产后第 6 天。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、苍白。R：结合产后高危背景继续骤停流程并快速转运。
bonusPointsZh: 用背景提高紧迫度判断

scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a dialysis clinic waiting area for a 63-year-old male who collapsed after treatment.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达透析中心等待区，一名 63 岁男性在透析后倒地。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Semi-clinical scene. Chairs, equipment, and staff present. No immediate hazards.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 半临床环境。现场有椅子、器械和工作人员。无直接危险。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient unresponsive, apneic, pulseless. Staff state he complained of palpitations and weakness before collapsing.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者无反应、无呼吸、无脉搏。工作人员表示他倒地前主诉心悸和无力。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Apply arrest resources promptly
Positioning: Supine with scene clutter managed
Rapid Transport?: Yes after immediate on-scene resuscitation priorities
Interventions: CPR, scene organization, consider dialysis-related causes
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：尽快接入骤停资源
Positioning：仰卧，但需先整理现场杂物
Rapid Transport?：是，但先完成即时现场复苏
Interventions：CPR、整理现场、考虑透析相关病因
secondarySurveyEn: Dialysis just completed
Dialysis access visible
Weakness and palpitations before collapse
Key exam issue: use context fast without getting lost in theory
secondarySurveyZh: 刚完成透析
可见透析通路
倒地前有无力和心悸
核心考点：快速利用背景，但不要陷入纯理论分析
scenarios.commentsEn: This is a pattern-recognition call. The exam usually wants you to appreciate the dialysis context quickly while still prioritizing basic CPR and scene flow.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这是模式识别题。考试通常想看你能否快速抓住透析背景，同时仍把基础 CPR 和现场流程放在最前面。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR
Clear clinic clutter interfering with care
Integrate dialysis history without delaying arrest priorities
Prepare rapid transport once immediate care is underway
interventionsZh: 立即 CPR
清理影响操作的器械杂物
结合透析病史但不拖延骤停优先项
即时处理启动后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: dialysis clinic arrest. B: collapse after treatment, palpitations and weakness beforehand. A/T: pulseless, apneic, dialysis access present. R: continue arrest care with dialysis-related context considered.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：透析中心骤停。B：透析后倒地，前有心悸和无力。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸，可见透析通路。R：结合透析背景继续骤停处理。
bonusPointsEn: Prevent equipment clutter from slowing CPR
bonusPointsZh: 别让设备杂乱拖慢 CPR

scenarios.titleEn: Nursing Home Arrest With Family Conflict
scenarios.titleZh: 养老院骤停并伴随家属冲突
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a nursing facility for a 78-year-old male found pulseless in bed. Staff state he is full code, but arriving family are arguing.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达养老机构，一名 78 岁男性在床上被发现无脉搏。工作人员说他是 full code，但刚到的家属正在争执。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Safe institutional scene. Staff performing CPR. Family conflict escalating nearby.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 机构环境安全。工作人员正在做 CPR。旁边家属争执升级。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient apneic and pulseless in bed. Staff are attempting compressions but paperwork is disorganized.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者在床上无呼吸、无脉搏。工作人员正在按压，但纸本文件混乱。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Arrest resources as available
Positioning: Move to appropriate CPR surface if needed
Rapid Transport?: Determined by arrest pathway and documentation context
Interventions: Take over CPR efficiently while clarifying official code-status documentation
primarySurveyZh: Positioning：必要时移到更适合 CPR 的平面
Rapid Transport?：依骤停路径和正式文件状态判断
Interventions：高效接手 CPR，同时厘清正式 code-status 文件
secondarySurveyEn: Facility reports full code status
Family member insists patient never wanted resuscitation
Documentation not immediately clear
History includes CHF, COPD, atrial fibrillation, dementia
Key exam issue: combine resuscitation with calm legal/ethical communication
secondarySurveyZh: 机构表示登记状态为 full code
家属坚称患者不想被抢救
文件一时无法清晰确认
病史包括 CHF、COPD、房颤、失智
核心考点：把复苏处理和冷静的法律/伦理沟通结合起来
scenarios.commentsEn: This is a classic exam blend of CPR skill, communication, ethics, and paperwork judgment. Do not let noise replace documentation.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这是 CPR 技术、沟通、伦理和文件判断混合在一起的经典考试题。不要让现场喊声取代正式文件。
interventionsEn: Take over CPR efficiently
Clarify official code-status documentation
Control family conflict away from patient care area
Proceed according to documented status and arrest pathway
interventionsZh: 高效接手 CPR
厘清正式 code-status 文件
将家属冲突控制在病人工作区外
按正式文件状态和骤停路径继续处理
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: nursing home arrest with CPR in progress. B: facility states full code, family disputes wishes. A/T: pulseless, apneic, paperwork unclear at first. R: continue arrest management while confirming official documentation.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：养老院骤停，现场 CPR 中。B：院方称 full code，家属对意愿有争议。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸，文件起初不清。R：在确认正式文件同时继续骤停处理。
bonusPointsZh: 让正式文件优先于喊叫

scenarios.titleEn: Respiratory Failure Progressing to Arrest (Severe Asthma)
scenarios.titleZh: 呼吸衰竭进展为心脏骤停（重度哮喘）
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to an apartment for a 22-year-old female with severe shortness of breath from a known asthma history. Family says she was struggling to breathe for several minutes before suddenly becoming quiet and collapsing.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达一间公寓，一名 22 岁女性有已知哮喘史，出现严重呼吸困难。家属表示她喘了好几分钟后突然变得安静并倒下。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Indoor scene safe. Inhalers visible on a nearby table.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。室内环境安全。附近桌上可见吸入剂。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient found on the floor, cyanotic, unresponsive, no effective breathing, no palpable pulse. Family reports she was tiring out and could no longer speak just before collapse.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者倒在地板上，发绀、无反应、无有效呼吸、摸不到脉搏。家属表示她倒地前已经明显疲惫，连话都说不出来。
primarySurveyEn: Circulation: No carotid pulse within 10 seconds
Adjuncts / AED: Arrest resources as available
Interventions: Immediate CPR, airway positioning, strong ventilation focus
primarySurveyZh: Circulation：10 秒内摸不到颈动脉搏动
Adjuncts / AED：按骤停流程可用资源处理
Interventions：立即 CPR、摆位气道、强调通气
secondarySurveyEn: Known severe asthma history
Family reports worsening wheeze, inability to speak full sentences, then sudden silence
Rescue inhaler present on scene
No trauma noted
Key exam issue: recognize tiring out as a pre-arrest red flag and understand this is a hypoxic respiratory arrest pattern
secondarySurveyZh: 已知重度哮喘史
家属表示先是喘鸣加重、无法完整说句子，随后突然安静
现场可见急救吸入剂
无创伤迹象
核心考点：识别 tiring out 是濒危征象，并理解这是缺氧型呼吸性骤停模式
scenarios.commentsEn: This scenario comes directly from respiratory failure notes: a patient who was working hard, then tiring out, then arrests. The exam wants you to think BVM/ventilation failure leading to CPR.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这题直接对应呼吸衰竭笔记：先拼命呼吸、再疲惫、最后骤停。考试想看你是否会把它理解为需要 BVM / 通气失败后进入 CPR。
interventionsEn: Immediate high-quality CPR
Prioritize effective ventilations
Coordinate airway support with chest compressions
Prepare for rapid transport after immediate arrest care
interventionsZh: 立即开始高质量 CPR
优先确保有效通气
让气道支持和胸外按压配合
完成即时骤停处理后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: severe asthma progressed to arrest. B: worsening respiratory distress, unable to speak, then collapse. A/T: pulseless, apneic, cyanotic, known asthma history. R: continue arrest pathway with strong ventilation focus and rapid transport.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：重度哮喘进展为骤停。B：呼吸困难加重、无法说话后倒地。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、发绀，已知哮喘史。R：继续骤停流程，强调通气并快速转运。
bonusPointsZh: 识别 tiring out 的危险性
把呼吸衰竭和骤停联系起来
及早想到 BVM / 通气支持

scenarios.titleEn: Pulmonary Edema / CHF Progressing to Arrest
scenarios.titleZh: 肺水肿 / CHF 进展为心脏骤停
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a residence for a 68-year-old male with severe shortness of breath. Family says he has CHF and became increasingly breathless while trying to sleep sitting upright in a chair.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达一户住宅，一名 68 岁男性严重呼吸困难。家属表示他有 CHF 病史，晚上坐着睡觉时呼吸越来越喘。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Indoor scene safe. Medication bottles and pillows stacked near a recliner chair.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。室内安全。躺椅边可见药瓶和垫高用枕头。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient has slipped from a chair to the floor, now unresponsive, apneic, and pulseless. Family reports he had pink frothy sputum and severe distress just before collapse.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者从椅子滑落到地上，现已无反应、无呼吸、无脉搏。家属说他倒地前有粉红泡沫痰和极重度呼吸窘迫。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Arrest resources as available
Interventions: Immediate CPR with ventilation/oxygenation awareness
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按骤停流程可用资源处理
Interventions：立即 CPR，并保持对氧合/通气问题的警觉
secondarySurveyEn: Known CHF history
Orthopnea reported: could not lie flat
Pink frothy sputum before collapse
No trauma noted
Key exam issue: pulmonary edema/CHF is a major respiratory red-flag pattern that can deteriorate into arrest
secondarySurveyZh: 已知 CHF 病史
存在端坐呼吸：无法平躺
倒地前有粉红泡沫痰
无创伤迹象
核心考点：肺水肿 / CHF 是重大呼吸红旗，可迅速恶化为骤停
scenarios.commentsEn: This scenario is based on the pulmonary edema / CHF note pattern. It tests whether you recognize severe respiratory compromise and fluid overload before the arrest transition.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这题对应肺水肿 / CHF 笔记模式。它在考你能否在进入骤停前识别严重呼吸受损和液体负荷背景。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR
Prioritize airway and ventilation support
Use history to recognize CHF / pulmonary edema context
Prepare rapid transport once immediate arrest care is underway
interventionsZh: 立即 CPR
优先气道与通气支持
利用病史识别 CHF / 肺水肿背景
即时处理开始后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: CHF / pulmonary edema patient progressed to arrest. B: severe dyspnea, orthopnea, pink frothy sputum before collapse. A/T: pulseless, apneic, pale, known CHF. R: continue arrest pathway with respiratory failure context in mind.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：CHF / 肺水肿患者进展为骤停。B：倒地前有重度呼吸困难、端坐呼吸、粉红泡沫痰。A/T：无脉搏、无呼吸、苍白，已知 CHF。R：结合呼吸衰竭背景继续骤停流程。
bonusPointsEn: Connect CHF to severe respiratory failure
Do not ignore pre-arrest red flags
bonusPointsZh: 识别粉红泡沫痰的意义
把 CHF 和重度呼吸衰竭联系起来

scenarios.titleEn: Altered LOC from Hypoglycemia Progressing to Arrest
scenarios.titleZh: 低血糖导致意识改变并进展为心脏骤停
scenarios.backgroundEn: You are first on scene to a workplace break room for a 47-year-old diabetic male who was found confused and diaphoretic, then suddenly collapsed before EMS arrival.
scenarios.backgroundZh: 你首先到达工作场所休息室，一名 47 岁糖尿病男性先被发现意识混乱、大量出汗，随后在 EMS 到达前突然倒地。
scenarios.sceneSurveyEn: Unremarkable. Indoor scene safe. Coworkers present. Glucose kit nearby but unused.
scenarios.sceneSurveyZh: 现场无明显危险。室内安全。有同事在场，旁边可见血糖用品但未使用。
scenarios.conditionEn: Patient on the floor, unresponsive, apneic, and pulseless. Coworkers say he was shaky, confused, and sweating heavily minutes before collapse.
scenarios.conditionZh: 患者倒在地上，无反应、无呼吸、无脉搏。同事表示他倒地前几分钟一直手抖、意识混乱并大量出汗。
primarySurveyEn: Adjuncts / AED: Arrest resources as available
Interventions: Immediate CPR; note altered LOC / diabetic context
primarySurveyZh: Adjuncts / AED：按骤停流程可用资源处理
Interventions：立即 CPR，并注意意识改变 / 糖尿病背景
secondarySurveyEn: Known diabetic history
Coworkers describe diaphoresis, confusion, shakiness before collapse
Lunch was skipped according to coworkers
No trauma noted
Key exam issue: altered LOC causes like hypoglycemia can deteriorate rapidly and should always trigger ABC thinking
secondarySurveyZh: 已知糖尿病史
同事描述倒地前有大汗、意识混乱、发抖
据同事说他中午没吃饭
无创伤迹象
核心考点：像低血糖这样的意识改变病因可能迅速恶化，必须始终回到 ABC 思维
scenarios.commentsEn: This scenario comes from the altered LOC notes. It tests whether you treat altered level of consciousness as a red flag for deterioration and not just as a minor medical complaint.
scenarios.commentsZh: 这题对应意识改变笔记。它在考你是否把 altered LOC 视为恶化红旗，而不是普通小病。
interventionsEn: Immediate CPR
Keep diabetic history in mind during arrest management
Use collateral history from coworkers quickly
Prepare rapid transport after immediate arrest priorities
interventionsZh: 立即 CPR
在骤停处理中记住糖尿病背景
快速从同事处补充旁证病史
完成即时骤停优先项后准备快速转运
scenarios.handoverEn: I/S: diabetic patient with altered LOC progressed to arrest. B: confusion, diaphoresis, shakiness, skipped meal. A/T: pulseless, apneic, pale and sweaty before collapse. R: continue arrest pathway with hypoglycemia / altered LOC context noted.
scenarios.handoverZh: I/S：糖尿病患者由意识改变进展为骤停。B：倒地前有意识混乱、大汗、发抖，并且没吃饭。A/T：现无脉搏、无呼吸，倒地前苍白出汗。R：结合低血糖 / altered LOC 背景继续骤停流程。
bonusPointsEn: Treat altered LOC as a red flag
Use collateral history without delaying CPR
bonusPointsZh: 把 altered LOC 当成红旗
通过病史线索想到低血糖
不耽误 CPR 地收集旁证病史
